title: Yaw MCP CLI configuration (.yaw-mcp/config.json)
description: Configuration file for the @yawlabs/mcp CLI (bin `yaw-mcp`), which manages MCP servers via the Yaw MCP registry. Resolved in precedence order (most-specific to least-specific): <project>/.yaw-mcp/config.local.json  >  <project>/.yaw-mcp/config.json  >  ~/.yaw-mcp/config.json. The project `.yaw-mcp/` directory is found by walking up from the current directory, stopping just before $HOME. Environment variables YAW_MCP_TOKEN and YAW_MCP_URL override file values. JSONC (comments) is permitted.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this JSON Schema, enabling IDE autocomplete in editors that honor $schema.

version.description: Config schema version. Current version: 1. A value newer than the CLI understands triggers a warning but is not fatal.

token.description: Personal access token for Yaw MCP. SECURITY: must NOT appear in a committed project-scope .yaw-mcp/config.json. Only valid in ~/.yaw-mcp/config.json (user-global) or .yaw-mcp/config.local.json (machine-local, gitignored). The YAW_MCP_TOKEN environment variable overrides this value.

apiBase.description: Base URL of the Yaw MCP API. Default: https://yaw.sh/mcp. The YAW_MCP_URL environment variable overrides this value.

servers.description: Allow-list of server namespaces to activate. If set in any scope, only these servers are active. Precedence: local scope wins over project, which wins over global (most-specific overrides).

blocked.description: Deny-list of server namespaces that are never activated. Merged as a union across all scopes (additive, not overriding).
